subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath sent down the verses and continueth to send them down as He willeth, and He, verily, is the Almighty, the All-Powerful over whatsoever He desireth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی نزل الایات و ینزلها کیف یشاء و هو المقتدر علی ما اراد لا نتمعه
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
